revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]

revision.comment: [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2023 February 4#Template:Distinguish]] closed as keep ([[WP:XFDC#4.0.13|XFDcloser]])
revision.text: {{#invoke:Distinguish|distinguish}}<noinclude><!-- splitting these lines causes {{Documentation}} template to terminate green shading when Distinguish is used in /doc pages. --> {{Documentation}} <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage and interwikis to Wikidata, not here! --> </noinclude>
:''Not to be confused with [[{{{1}}}]].''
:''Distinguish from [[{{{1}}}]].''
:''Not to be confused with [[{{{1}}}]].''[[Category:Disambiguation and Redirection templates|Distinguish]]
:''Not to be confused with [[{{{1}}}]].''[[Category:Disambiguation and redirection templates|Distinguish]]

:''Not to be confused with [[{{{1}}}]].'' See also {{[[Template:Distinguish2|Distinguish2]]}}, a more flexible version; {{Distinguish|''foo''}} is equivalent to {{Distinguish2|[[''foo'']]}}. [[Category:Disambiguation and redirection templates|Distinguish]]

:''Not to be confused with [[{{{1}}}]]{{#if:{{{2|}}} or [[[{{{2}}}]]}}.'' See also {{[[Template:Distinguish2|Distinguish2]]}}, a more flexible version; {{Distinguish|''foo''}} is equivalent to {{Distinguish2|[[''foo'']]}}. [[Category:Disambiguation and redirection templates|Distinguish]]

:''Not to be confused with [[{{{1}}}]]{{#if:{{{2|}}}| or [[[{{{2}}}]]}}.'' See also {{[[Template:Distinguish2|Distinguish2]]}}, a more flexible version; {{Distinguish|''foo''}} is equivalent to {{Distinguish2|[[''foo'']]}}. [[Category:Disambiguation and redirection templates|Distinguish]]

:''Not to be confused with [[{{{1}}}]]{{#if:{{{2|}}}| or [[{{{2}}}]]}}.'' See also {{[[Template:Distinguish2|Distinguish2]]}}, a more flexible version; {{Distinguish|''foo''}} is equivalent to {{Distinguish2|[[''foo'']]}}. [[Category:Disambiguation and redirection templates|Distinguish]]

revision.comment: Implemented in site-wide CSS. [[Wikipedia:Bypass your cache|bypass your cache]] to see it.
revision.text: Not to be confused with [[{{{1}}}]]{{#if:{{{2|}}}| or [[{{{2}}}]]}}. {{hprotected}} ==Usage== {{Distinguish|foo}} {{Distinguish|foo}} {{Distinguish|foo|bar}} {{Distinguish|foo|bar}} ==See also== *{{[[Template:Distinguish2|Distinguish2]]}} [[Category:Disambiguation and redirection templates|Distinguish]]

revision.comment: i can't believe this is the way conditional templates are still done :)
per talk. The current wording is way off the intention of this template
Rephrasing (cf [[Template talk:Distinguish#Wording]]), moving documentation to /doc page
restoring "Not to be confused with" per [[Template talk:Distinguish#More on wording|talkpage thread]]

revision.text:
{{dablink|Not to be confused with [[{{{1}}}]]{{#if:{{{2|}}} | or [[{{{2}}}]]}}{{#if:{{{3|}}} | or [[{{{3}}}]]}}{{#if:{{{4|}}} | or [[{{{4}}}]]}}.}}
{{hprotected}} {{/doc}}

revision.comment: trying commas in place of string of "or"s
+missing period if only first parameter used
colon params, so that we link regardless of title (cats, images)
use [[Template:(D)]] for intentional links to disambiguation pages
consistency in linking, to permit piping of links
simplify - I have no idea how anyone can read that code style...
join lines to fix usages in {{Documentation}} - green shading terminates early
fix extra space between first item and "or" when there are two items (why did I stick an nbsp there? =P )
Nominated for deletion; see [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2014 July 6#Template:Distinguish]]. ([[WP:TW|TW]])
let us try this for a time
"and" is more in line with this wording
[[WP:BRD|BRD revert]] or changes by [[User:Paine Ellsworth]]: Wording is deteriorated.
Implementing trimer. Tests in the sandbox look good.

:''Not to be confused with [[{{{1}}}]].''
:''Distinguish from [[{{{1}}}]].''
:''Not to be confused with [[{{{1}}}]].''[[Category:Disambiguation and Redirection templates|Distinguish]]
:''Not to be confused with [[{{{1}}}]].''[[Category:Disambiguation and redirection templates|Distinguish]]

:''Not to be confused with [[{{{1}}}]].'' See also {{[[Template:Distinguish2|Distinguish2]]}}, a more flexible version; {{Distinguish|''foo''}} is equivalent to {{Distinguish2|[[''foo'']]}}. [[Category:Disambiguation and redirection templates|Distinguish]]

:''Not to be confused with [[{{{1}}}]]{{#if:{{{2|}}} or [[[{{{2}}}]]}}.'' See also {{[[Template:Distinguish2|Distinguish2]]}}, a more flexible version; {{Distinguish|''foo''}} is equivalent to {{Distinguish2|[[''foo'']]}}. [[Category:Disambiguation and redirection templates|Distinguish]]

revision.comment: Implemented in site-wide CSS. [[Wikipedia:Bypass your cache|bypass your cache]] to see it.
revision.text: Not to be confused with [[{{{1}}}]]{{#if:{{{2|}}}| or [[{{{2}}}]]}}. {{hprotected}} ==Usage== {{Distinguish|foo}} {{Distinguish|foo}} {{Distinguish|foo|bar}} {{Distinguish|foo|bar}} ==See also== *{{[[Template:Distinguish2|Distinguish2]]}} [[Category:Disambiguation and redirection templates|Distinguish]]

revision.comment: i can't believe this is the way conditional templates are still done :)
per talk. The current wording is way off the intention of this template
Rephrasing (cf [[Template talk:Distinguish#Wording]]), moving documentation to /doc page
restoring "Not to be confused with" per [[Template talk:Distinguish#More on wording|talkpage thread]]

revision.text:
{{dablink|Not to be confused with [[{{{1}}}]]{{#if:{{{2|}}} | or [[{{{2}}}]]}}{{#if:{{{3|}}} | or [[{{{3}}}]]}}{{#if:{{{4|}}} | or [[{{{4}}}]]}}.}}
{{hprotected}} {{/doc}}

revision.comment: trying commas in place of string of "or"s
+missing period if only first parameter used
colon params, so that we link regardless of title (cats, images)
use [[Template:(D)]] for intentional links to disambiguation pages
consistency in linking, to permit piping of links
simplify - I have no idea how anyone can read that code style...
join lines to fix usages in {{Documentation}} - green shading terminates early
fix extra space between first item and "or" when there are two items (why did I stick an nbsp there? =P )
Nominated for deletion; see [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2014 July 6#Template:Distinguish]]. ([[WP:TW|TW]])
let us try this for a time
"and" is more in line with this wording

Implementing trimer. Tests in the sandbox look good.
